ab: pakbalayq ci kabawx cu pila’ ki isu’ quw?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: balayq ga, kituwa’ aalun su’?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: umungi’ ci maras cu pila’ la, pakbalayq ci kabawx cu pila’ ki isu’quw?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ini’ cu aras cu pila’ wala!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: umungi’ ci maras cu pila’ la, pakbalayq ci kabawx cu pila’ ki isu’ quw?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: iys, ini’ su’ pasayugiy kuwing na’ ku kinabaxan ka pila’ cku yani.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: pakbalayq mu kabaxan ku situwing su’ quw?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: uwal, agal nanak.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: pakbalayq mi kabaxan ku ruwas su’ quw?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: sipakabawx mi Yuraw la.
en: B: I lent it to Yuraw.

ab: kabaxay ta’ ku tamayray su’ quw?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: uwal, asikinaga satu’ lawwiy i casan ke!
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: qumuwalax la, ini’ cu aras cu hawsuwa, kabaxay ta’ cu hawsuwa han quw?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: qutux nanak ku hawswa mu, taumukay ta’ kawsa’.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: yani ku pinkabawx si kuwing cuku yani ku ruwas kahani, biqanay mi isu’ la.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: nanuwan ku ruwas ka tatalun su’ na’, kalani kuwing.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: papsayugan mi su’ kanuwan cu pila’?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: hanuan, kiya a pila’ su’ lga kaal la.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: papsayugan si kanuwan ku pila mu?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: pasayugay mi su’ i casan.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: papsayugan si kanuwan ku ruwas mu?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: aquw mi su’ sipasayu cuhisa’ la!
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: pinkabawx su’ ni Yukeq ku papateq ka haniy quw?
en: A: Did Yukeh lend you this pen?

ab: uwal, kinabaxan mu ki hiya’ sawni’.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: kinabaxan su’ ki Yukeh ku papateq ka hani quw?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Yukeh?

ab: iqaat, binaynay ni yaya’ ku hani.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: ukas a timu’ la, usa’ kabawx cu timu’ ki Yuma’.
ch: A:沒有鹽了，去跟Yuma’ 借點鹽。
en: A: We're out of salt, go borrow some from Yuma'.

ab: uwal, halay ci kabawx.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: usa’ kumaal Tiwas maha pasayugi ku pila mu.
en: B: Go and ask Tiwas to return my money.

ab: piya’ pila’ ku kusa’ niya’ ki isu’?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
